payload.label: couch
payload.short_description: edge-cropped dark brown leather couch arm
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped dark brown leather couch showing a padded armrest/console and adjacent two-seat cushions with vertical seamed stitching and a slight glossy worn finish; a small remote or device sits on the armrest and a wooden side table is visible at the lower right—approximately 1.2 m from the camera.
